name: Greta
role: Solitary keeper of the switchback's halfway waystation
voiceHints: Weathered, spare with words, keeps a hearth and a kettle for anyone off the trail. Remembers every traveler and what they carried — a gift and, to the guilty, a threat. Chose this solitude for reasons she keeps.
knowledge: Everyone who has crossed the switchback in years, and what they bore
What has been taking the strange objects from travelers' packs on the upper trail
The real reason she keeps this lonely post
wants: The quiet she came here for, and to keep the waystation a safe roof for those who need it.
fears: That her memory makes her a target for someone who crossed carrying something they'd kill to un-remember.
